headline: Why Lumentum Is A Buy Despite The Run-Up
summary: Lumentum (LITE) surged after unveiling advanced AI data center networking solutions at OFC 2026, including a 1.6T DR4 OSFP transceiver and high-power lasers.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Cadence Design Systems at around US$293.75 is still a quality opportunity or if the price already reflects most of the good news, this breakdown will help you frame that question clearly. The stock has had a mixed run, with a 0.2% return over the last 7 days, a 1.9% decline over the last 30 days, a 5.4% decline year to date, a 15.7% return over the last year, and 129.0% over five years, which naturally raises questions about what is already priced in. Recent...
